title: Bane of Shulkers
description: Squash Shulkers like bugs! Now BoA works on Shulkers.
body:
# Bane of Shulkers

[![Modrinth Badge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/c7fd18efdadd1c3f12ae56b49afd834640d2d797/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/bane-of-shulkers) [![GitHub Badge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/c7fd18efdadd1c3f12ae56b49afd834640d2d797/assets/cozy/available/github_vector.svg)](https://github.com/ferdinandkeller/bane-of-shulkers)

Finally makes that dusty enchantment worth keeping!

Adds shulkers to the Bane of Arthropods (BoA) enchantment target list, simply because **if it has a shell and annoying attacks, it's close enough to count as a bug!**

This mod expands the reach of Bane of Arthropods to include shulkers, giving you a tactical advantage in the End while making this underused enchantment actually valuable. Perfect for players who want their pest control tools to work on End dimension "bugs" too.

Now your spider-slaying sword has a purpose beyond the Overworld!
